title: Fix: XML injection vulnerability
original_text: Fixed XML injection vulnerability in XML parser. Implemented secure XML parsing with validation. Added XML entity expansion limits. Implemented XML schema validation. Added XML sanitization for user input. Result: XML injection vulnerability fixed.
expected_body_lines: - Implement secure XML parsing with validation
- Add XML sanitization for user input
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(security): fix XML injection vulnerability"
